metadata.title: ACME Health Patient Intake API - HIPAA Compliance Component

components.title: Patient Intake API
components.description: HIPAA-compliant patient intake API with automated policy enforcement
components.purpose: Provides secure PHI collection and storage with encryption, access controls, and audit logging

implemented-requirements.description: Encryption and Decryption - Implement a mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI

statements.description: KMS Customer-Managed Keys (CMK) encrypt all PHI at rest in S3 buckets and DynamoDB tables. Automated policy enforcement prevents deployment of PHI resources without CMK encryption.

implemented-requirements.description: Transmission Security - Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic communications networks

statements.description: S3 bucket policies enforce TLS-only access (aws:SecureTransport). Lambda functions handling PHI are deployed in VPC with security groups controlling network access. Automated policies block deployment of PHI resources allowing non-TLS access.

implemented-requirements.description: Contingency Plan - Establish (and implement as needed) procedures to restore any loss of data

statements.description: S3 versioning enabled on all PHI buckets. DynamoDB point-in-time recovery (PITR) enabled. Automated policy enforcement prevents deployment of PHI resources without versioning.

implemented-requirements.description: Access Control - Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain ePHI to allow access only to those persons or software programs that have been granted access rights

statements.description: IAM policies implement least privilege principle with specific actions (no wildcards). Lambda execution roles grant only required permissions. Automated policy enforcement blocks deployment of overly permissive IAM policies.

implemented-requirements.description: Audit Controls - Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use ePHI

statements.description: CloudTrail multi-region trail with log file validation enabled. Data events capture all S3 object operations and DynamoDB table operations on PHI resources. Logs encrypted with KMS and stored in dedicated S3 bucket with Object Lock (90-day retention).

implemented-requirements.description: Information System Activity Review - Implement procedures to regularly review records of information system activity

statements.description: Evidence vault stores cryptographically signed compliance evidence bundles with Object Lock. GitHub Actions pipeline generates audit evidence for every infrastructure change. Cosign signatures provide non-repudiation.
